sections.paragraph:
Original: חבל חבל

Transliteration: chebel chêbel

Phonetic: kheh'-bel

BDB Definition:

  1. a cord, rope, territory, band, company
    1. a rope, cord
    2. a measuring-cord or line
    3. a measured portion, lot, part, region
    4. a band or company
  2. pain, sorrow, travail, pang
    1. pains of travail
    2. pains, pangs, sorrows
  3. union
  4. destruction

Origin: from H2254

TWOT entry: 592b,595a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
